  5. How Much Does It Cost to Register a Trademark in China?

How Much Does It Cost to Register a Trademark in China?

📋 Key Takeaway

Registering a trademark in China costs between ¥300 (~$44)-¥3,000+ (~$441+) (approximately ~$45-$440 USD), depending on the number of classes, complexity, and whether you use a professional agent. Understanding the complete cost structure helps you budget effectively and avoid unexpected expenses.

💰 Complete Cost Breakdown

Official CNIPA Fees

Basic Filing Fee:

  • ✓¥300 (~$44) per class (up to 10 items)
  • ✓¥30 (~$4) per additional item (over 10)
  • ✓Covers one trademark in one class

Examples:

  • ✓Single class, 10 items: ¥300 (~$44)
  • ✓Single class, 15 items: ¥450 (~$66)
  • ✓Two classes, 10 items each: ¥600 (~$88)

Additional Fees:

  • ✓Priority claim: ¥150 (~$22)
  • ✓Collective mark: ¥1,500 (~$221)
  • ✓Certification mark: ¥1,500 (~$221)
  • ✓Geographic indication: ¥1,500 (~$221)

Professional Agent Fees

Why Use an Agent:

  • ✓Required for foreign applicants
  • ✓Local expertise and knowledge
  • ✓Higher success rate
  • ✓Time and stress savings

RTMCN's Pricing:

  • ✓Standard service: ¥1,500 (~$221) per class
  • ✓Includes comprehensive search
  • ✓Full application management
  • ✓Status updates and monitoring
  • ✓No hidden fees

Total Cost Examples:

  • ✓Single class (RTMCN): ¥1,800 (~$265) (~$265 USD)
  • ✓Two classes (RTMCN): ¥3,600 (~$529) (~$530 USD)
  • ✓Three classes (RTMCN): ¥5,400 (~$794) (~$795 USD)

Translation Costs

When Needed:

  • ✓English to Chinese translation
  • ✓Chinese character trademark
  • ✓Document translation

Typical Costs:

  • ✓Simple translation: ¥100-300 (~$15-44)
  • ✓Complex documents: ¥500-1,000 (~$74-147)
  • ✓Certified translation: ¥200-500 (~$29-74)

RTMCN's Approach:

  • ✓Translation included in service
  • ✓Professional translators
  • ✓Quality assurance
  • ✓No additional charges

💰 Hidden Costs to Watch Out For

1. Classification Errors

The Problem:

  • ✓Wrong class selection
  • ✓Incomplete coverage
  • ✓Need to refile

The Cost:

  • ✓Refiling fee: ¥300 (~$44) per class
  • ✓Lost time: 3-6 months
  • ✓Potential squatting risk

RTMCN's Prevention:

  • ✓Expert classification analysis
  • ✓Comprehensive search
  • ✓Strategic recommendations
  • ✓Future-proof planning

2. Objection Responses

When It Happens:

  • ✓CNIPA raises concerns
  • ✓Similar mark conflicts
  • ✓Documentation issues

The Cost:

  • ✓Response preparation: ¥1,000-3,000 (~$147-441)
  • ✓Additional evidence: ¥500-1,500 (~$74-221)
  • ✓Time delay: 2-3 months

RTMCN's Service:

  • ✓Proactive risk assessment
  • ✓Strong initial application
  • ✓Quick response capability
  • ✓Included in standard service

3. Opposition Defense

When It Happens:

  • ✓Third party files opposition
  • ✓Competitor challenges
  • ✓Squatter interference

The Cost:

  • ✓Defense preparation: ¥3,000-10,000 (~$441-1471)
  • ✓Legal representation: ¥5,000-20,000 (~$735-2941)
  • ✓Time delay: 6-12 months

RTMCN's Expertise:

  • ✓Strong defense strategies
  • ✓Evidence gathering
  • ✓Negotiation skills
  • ✓Legal representation

4. Renewal Fees

When Due:

  • ✓Every 10 years
  • ✓6-month grace period
  • ✓Late renewal penalties

The Cost:

  • ✓Standard renewal: ¥500 (~$74)
  • ✓Late renewal: ¥750 (~$110)
  • ✓Agent fee: ¥500-1,000 (~$74-147)

RTMCN's Service:

  • ✓Renewal reminders
  • ✓Deadline management
  • ✓Smooth process
  • ✓No penalties

💰 Cost Comparison: DIY vs. Professional

DIY Approach

Costs:

  • ✓Official fees: ¥300 (~$44) per class
  • ✓Translation: ¥200-500 (~$29-74)
  • ✓Research time: 20+ hours
  • ✓Learning curve: Significant

Risks:

  • ✓40% rejection rate
  • ✓Classification errors
  • ✓Missed deadlines
  • ✓No local representation

Total Cost: ¥500-1,000 (~$74-147) + high risk

Professional Agent (RTMCN)

Costs:

  • ✓Official fees: ¥300 (~$44) per class
  • ✓Agent service: ¥1,500 (~$221) per class
  • ✓Translation: Included
  • ✓Total: ¥1,800 (~$265) per class

Benefits:

  • ✓100% success rate
  • ✓Expert classification
  • ✓Deadline management
  • ✓Local representation

Total Cost: ¥1,800 (~$265) per class + peace of mind

Cost-Benefit Analysis

DIY Risks:

  • ✓Rejection: ¥300 (~$44) lost
  • ✓Refiling: ¥300 (~$44) additional
  • ✓Time: 6+ months lost
  • ✓Opportunity cost: High

Professional Benefits:

  • ✓Higher success rate
  • ✓Faster processing
  • ✓Strategic planning
  • ✓Long-term protection

Conclusion: Professional service is more cost-effective when you factor in risks and time.

✅ RTMCN's Transparent Pricing

Standard Package

What's Included:

  • ✓Comprehensive trademark search
  • ✓Classification analysis
  • ✓Application preparation
  • ✓CNIPA submission
  • ✓Status monitoring
  • ✓Progress updates
  • ✓Certificate delivery

Price: ¥1,500 (~$221) per class

Total with Official Fees: ¥1,800 (~$265) per class

Premium Package

Additional Services:

  • ✓Priority processing
  • ✓Enhanced monitoring
  • ✓Opposition defense
  • ✓Renewal management
  • ✓Portfolio management

Price: ¥2,500 (~$368) per class

Total with Official Fees: ¥2,800 (~$412) per class

Enterprise Package

For Multiple Trademarks:

  • ✓Volume discounts
  • ✓Dedicated account manager
  • ✓Strategic planning
  • ✓Portfolio optimization
  • ✓Ongoing support

Price: Custom pricing

Contact for Quote: RTMCN Contact

📌 Budget Planning Tips

1. Register Early

Why It Matters:

  • ✓Prevents squatting
  • ✓Lower costs (no recovery)
  • ✓Strategic advantage
  • ✓Peace of mind

Cost Savings:

  • ✓Early registration: ¥1,800 (~$265)
  • ✓Recovery from squatter: ¥10,000+ (~$1471+)
  • ✓Legal battles: ¥50,000+ (~$7353+)

2. Choose Classes Wisely

Strategy:

  • ✓Register core classes first
  • ✓Add related classes later
  • ✓Consider future expansion
  • ✓Balance coverage vs. cost

RTMCN's Advice:

  • ✓Expert classification analysis
  • ✓Strategic recommendations
  • ✓Cost-effective planning
  • ✓Future-proof strategy

3. Plan for Renewals

Timeline:

  • ✓First renewal: 10 years
  • ✓Subsequent: Every 10 years
  • ✓Grace period: 6 months
  • ✓Penalty for late renewal

Budget:

  • ✓Set aside ¥500-1,000 (~$74-147) per renewal
  • ✓Include agent fees
  • ✓Plan ahead
  • ✓Avoid penalties

4. Monitor and Maintain

Ongoing Costs:

  • ✓Monitoring services: ¥500-1,000 (~$74-147)/year
  • ✓Opposition defense: ¥3,000-10,000 (~$441-1471)
  • ✓Portfolio management: ¥1,000-3,000 (~$147-441)/year

RTMCN's Services:

  • ✓Comprehensive monitoring
  • ✓Quick response
  • ✓Strategic management
  • ✓Cost-effective packages

💰 Real-World Cost Examples

Example 1: Single Class (Simple)

Scenario:

  • ✓One trademark
  • ✓One class (e.g., Class 42 - Software)
  • ✓10 items
  • ✓No complications

Costs:

  • ✓Official fees: ¥300 (~$44)
  • ✓RTMCN service: ¥1,500 (~$221)
  • ✓Total: ¥1,800 (~$265) (~$265 USD)

Timeline: 10-12 months

Example 2: Multiple Classes

Scenario:

  • ✓One trademark
  • ✓Three classes (e.g., 9, 35, 42)
  • ✓10 items each
  • ✓No complications

Costs:

  • ✓Official fees: ¥900 (~$132) (3 × ¥300 (~$44))
  • ✓RTMCN service: ¥4,500 (~$662) (3 × ¥1,500 (~$221))
  • ✓Total: ¥5,400 (~$794) (~$795 USD)

Timeline: 10-14 months

Example 3: With Opposition

Scenario:

  • ✓One trademark
  • ✓One class
  • ✓Third-party opposition
  • ✓Defense required

Costs:

  • ✓Official fees: ¥300 (~$44)
  • ✓RTMCN service: ¥1,500 (~$221)
  • ✓Opposition defense: ¥5,000 (~$735)
  • ✓Total: ¥6,800 (~$1000) (~$1,000 USD)

Timeline: 18-24 months
